claims.text: The invention claimed is: 1. A pharmaceutical composition comprising: i) about 15 to about 25 wt.-% dexamethasone or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt or solvate thereof; ii) about 45 to about 60 wt....
14. A method of treating multiple myeloma in a subject in need thereof comprising administering to the subject the pharmaceutical composition of claim 1 in combination with an anti-cancer drug.
